title: Squirrel Removal in Pelham Manor, NY | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Pelham Manor, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving historic Pelham Manor homes. Call today!
intro: Pelham Manor's beautiful tree-lined streets and historic homes provide the perfect habitat for squirrels, but when they invade your attic or walls, they can cause serious damage. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Pelham Manor, combining humane trapping with permanent exclusion solutions. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges facing this charming Westchester village and provide customized solutions for every property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Pelham Manor homeowners for years with safe, effective squirrel removal that protects both your property and the community's wildlife. Our licensed professionals use proven techniques tailored to the village's distinctive architecture, from Tudor Revival estates to Colonial homes, ensuring complete removal and prevention without compromising your home's historic character.
localContext: Pelham Manor's mature oak and maple trees along Shore Road and the areas surrounding Manor Park create ideal conditions for squirrel populations to thrive. The village's stately older homes, with their numerous entry points and spacious attics, are particularly vulnerable to squirrel infestations, especially during fall and winter months when these persistent pests seek warm shelter.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Pelham Manor?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Pelham Manor typically ranges from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and sanitation. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all Pelham Manor properties.

faqs.question: Are squirrels damaging my Pelham Manor home?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage to Pelham Manor homes by chewing through roof shingles, soffits, and fascia boards to gain entry. Once inside, they gnaw on electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damage insulation, and leave droppings that contaminate attic spaces. Early removal is essential to prevent costly repairs.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Pelham Manor property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Pelham Manor residents. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and their activity patterns. We'll set humane traps, monitor daily, seal all entry points once squirrels are removed, and provide follow-up to ensure your home remains squirrel-free.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Pelham Manor humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We follow all New York State wildlife regulations and Westchester County guidelines for humane squirrel removal. Our methods prioritize safe, live trapping and relocation when possible, along with exclusion techniques that prevent re-entry. We never use harmful poisons or inhumane practices, protecting both your family and Pelham Manor's local wildlife.
